mapper.sql: id, kb_id, user_id, file_name, object_key, mime_type, file_size, file_hash, extension, document_status, error_stage, error_message, chunk_count, retry_count, uploader_name, current_version_no, next_version_no, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO km_document ( kb_id, user_id, file_name, object_key, mime_type, file_size, file_hash, extension, document_status, uploader_name, current_version_no, next_version_no, is_deleted, created_at ) VALUES ( #{kbId}, #{uploaderUserId}, #{originalName}, #{filePath}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{extension}, #{status}, #{uploaderName}, 0, 1, 0, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE km_document SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE km_document SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM km_document WHERE is_deleted = 1 AND deleted_at <= #{now} ORDER BY id LIMIT 100

SELECT id, task_type, task_status, progress, error_stage, error_message, retry_count, trigger_source, created_at, started_at, finished_at FROM km_document_process_task WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, doc_id, task_type, trigger_source, task_status, progress, error_stage, error_message, retry_count, created_at, started_at, finished_at FROM km_document_process_task WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE km_document SET user_id = #{uploaderUserId}, uploader_name = #{uploaderName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE km_document SET mime_type = #{mimeType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_hash = #{fileHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
